articles.title: NCAA appeals Brendan Sorsby ruling - NBC Sports
articles.description: As expected, the NCAA has appealed the court decision restoring the eligibility of Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby.
articles.content:

articles.author: Julie Bort
articles.title: Apple’s WWDC AI demos looked more real after $250M false ad settlement - TechCrunch
articles.description: The vibe of Apple's 2026 WWDC keynote felt like a spouse proudly listing all the honey-do-list items tackled. One subtle example: the many AI demos of someone standing, phone in hand.
articles.content: The vibe of Apple’s 2026 Worldwide Developers Conference felt like a spouse proudly listing all the items on a honey-do-list they’d finally completed. Rather than showcase something exciting and new,… [+3452 chars]

articles.title: A Falcon 9 booster turns five years old—and just set a remarkable reuse record - Ars Technica
articles.description: We take the Falcon 9 rocket for granted. But we probably shouldn't.
